title: Heap Structure and Heapsort Process
description: A visual representation of a max-heap's binary tree structure and the steps of the heapsort algorithm.
relationships: Parent nodes are greater than or equal to child nodes (max-heap property)
Array index i has left child at 2i+1 and right child at 2i+2
Heapsort builds a max-heap, then repeatedly extracts the maximum element to sort the array
